drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f2 == true, f0 >= 6.0, f2 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T2($p0_0.getF1(), false, $p0_0.getF0(), $p0_0.isF2()));
    $p0_0.setF2(true);
    update($p0_0);
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f0 < 10, f1 not in ("beta", "zz"), $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f2)
    not T2(f1 == $b1_0_1)
    exists T1()
then
    insertLogical(new T2($p1_0.getF1(), $b1_0_1, -1.5, $b1_0_1));
end
rule "R2"
when
    not T0(f0 >= 2.0, f1 in ("zz"), !(f1 contains "l"))
then
    insert(new T1(4, "a", false));
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f2 == false, f1 contains "ab", $b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f2, f2 == false)
then
    insert(new T2("ab", true, 0.0, false));
    modify($p3_0) { setF2(true), setF1($b3_0_0) }
end
name: fz_7_8623
